title: gNOMO pipeline validation data
author: Muñoz-Benavent, Maria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Validation data for the gNOMO pipeline. 12 samples correspoding to metagenomics data, 12 samples corresponding to metatranscriptomics data (marked as RNA), and 7 samples corresponnding to metaproteomics data.
steps_raw: Validation data for the gNOMO pipeline. 12 samples correspoding to metagenomics data, 12 samples corresponding to metatranscriptomics data (marked as RNA), and 7 samples corresponnding to metaproteomics data.
